name: Client Operating Model Phase 1 Client System Discovery
outcome_goal: Produce the client system discovery and connector census implementation packet.
anti_requirements: Do not turn connector discovery into hidden script authority.
Do not assume connector behavior without catalog or integration evidence.

jobs.label: phase_01_client_system_discovery_packet
jobs.prompt: Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_01_client_system_discovery/PLAN.md. Produce a bounded build packet for Phase 1: Client System Discovery and Connector Census. Specify how Praxis inventories systems, integrations, connector capabilities, credential health, object catalogs, API limits, webhook/event surfaces, and automation-bearing tools. Include authority model, proposed tables/projections if needed, CQRS operations, typed gaps, fixture strategy, tests, validation commands, and failure containment. Do not edit code.
